title: Test Strategy Game Engine
purpose: Teach students how to take standardized tests strategically, not just memorize content.

core_modes.name: Elimination Lab
core_modes.description: Students practice crossing out weak answer choices before selecting the final answer.

core_modes.name: Time Attack
core_modes.description: Students practice pacing and learn when to move on instead of getting stuck.

core_modes.name: Confidence Meter
core_modes.description: Students mark confidence after each answer to build metacognition and review habits.

core_modes.name: Boss Battle Review
core_modes.description: Students clear a themed set by answering a streak of mixed-difficulty questions.

ui_recommendations: Show one question at a time
Track average time per question type
Display explanation after each question or after round
Reward smart skips, not just raw speed
